name: Factory
notes: Shared building type between Capital and Foundry Reach (see game-design/02-bases-and-buildings.md) — base eligibility is authored on each BaseDef's buildableBuildings list, not here. Only light land vehicles — heavy tanks require Fort Irongrad/Winter Forge (see game-design/08-troop-roster.md). Max level is derived as length(productionUpgradeLevels) = 5, one per troop in data/troops/: Tonk, Ambulance, Light Tank, Basekiller, Transport Carrier, in that unlock order. HP regen follows the global rule (5% of current max HP per 5s tick), not a per-building field.
